characterName: Silver Bob Schoolgirl Pixel / Top-down All Actions 5x8
description: Combined 5-row by 8-column transparent pixel spritesheet: idle, move down, move left, move right, move up. Each frame is 128x128.
style: crisp top-down pixel RPG character spritesheet atlas, transparent PNG
prompt: Use the supplied anime schoolgirl reference as identity and palette anchor. Create a small full-body top-down RPG pixel sprite with short white/silver bob hair, mauve-red eyes, dark green-black school blazer, white collar, pale pink ribbon, dark pleated skirt, and black socks. Produce stable registered frames on flat green chroma key for cleanup.

artSourcePolicy: Visible pixel character art was generated/redrawn as raster spritesheet strips from the supplied reference. Code only removed chroma key, detected cells, applied one shared global scale/root anchor, packed transparent strips, and wrote metadata.
qualityPolicy: Pixel-art source inspected after alpha cleanup; no code-drawn eyes, hair, clothes, limbs, or animation frames were added.
normalization: Five generated action strips were cleaned, normalized with one shared global scale/root anchor, then packed into a 5x8 transparent atlas. Row order: idle, move down, move left, move right, move up.
inputReferenceInvariant: Preserve the supplied girl: pale anime schoolgirl, short white/silver bob with blunt bangs, mauve-red eyes, dark green-black blazer, white collar, pale pink ribbon, dark pleated skirt, black socks. No book or seated pose in the pixel top-down sprite.
rootAnchorPolicy: fixed full-body foot/root anchor shared across idle and WASD movement strips
adaptiveFramePolicy: 5 rows x 8 columns; use row clips for gameplay animation bindings.
